subject: Re: Fwd: Libor
body:
yes

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

> Peg's e-mail relates to $22 mm of the $75 mm Bank
> One line of credit, which  
> was drawn down on in three separate traunches of $50
> mm, $3 mm and $22 mm.   
> The 10/27/06 date refers to the date on which the
> most recent one-month LIBOR  
> election matures for the $3 mm traunch.  I had asked
> Dave Hammond if he  could 
> make the $3 mm and $22 mm traunches co-terminous if
> we decided that we  
> wanted to simplify matters that way.  Apparently, he
> has agreed and, if we  want, 
> we can elect a LIBOR rate for the $22 mm of 5.82%
> for the period ending  
> 10/27/06. the same date on which the one-month
> election ends for the $3 mm  traunch.
>  
> Should I tell Peg to proceed with a 10/27/06
> end-date LIBOR election at  
> 5.82% for the $22 mm traunch?  Please advise.
>

body_html:
yes

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Peg's e-mail relates to $22 mm of the $75 mm Bank
One line of credit, which
was drawn down on in three separate traunches of $50
mm, $3 mm and $22 mm.
The 10/27/06 date refers to the date on which the
most recent one-month LIBOR
election matures for the $3 mm traunch. I had asked
Dave Hammond if he could
make the $3 mm and $22 mm traunches co-terminous if
we decided that we
wanted to simplify matters that way. Apparently, he
has agreed and, if we want,
we can elect a LIBOR rate for the $22 mm of 5.82%
for the period ending
10/27/06. the same date on which the one-month
election ends for the $3 mm traunch.

Should I tell Peg to proceed with a 10/27/06
end-date LIBOR election at
5.82% for the $22 mm traunch? Please advise.

Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com (mailto:dkiesq@aol.com)

electronic signature under applicable
law.

Date: Wed, 04 Oct 2006 09:03:50 -0400
To: dKIESQ@aol.com
From: Peg Ugland pegu@naproperty.com
Subject: Libor

Hi Darren,
The 22 mil Libor comes due today. The rates are as
follows:

30 days or 10/27/06 when 3 mil is due   5.82
60 days                 5.35
90 days                 5.37

Please let me know what Jeffrey wants to do.
Thanks.
Peg
